milestones.name: Runtime Spine
milestones.objective: 稳定 root SDK defaults、runtime identity、message/event/step/export/import/checkpoint/resume 基础契约，让 graph 可以在稳定 step 边界恢复。

milestones.name: Model Spine
milestones.objective: 提供 provider-neutral model contract、provider registry/router、route set、fallback decision、middleware、fake provider 和 OpenAI-compatible reference adapter。
open_items: 真实 OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/OpenRouter provider adapter 移入外部 gopact-adapters-model 仓库
生产级 provider 健康检查、预算策略和评测治理继续由 adapter/plugin 深化

milestones.name: Tool and Sandbox Spine
milestones.objective: 提供 visible/deferred tool registry、artifact、sandbox、policy、tool middleware、retry/effect/replay 和 verification evidence 第一片。
open_items: tools.CommitStore / WithReplayCommitStore replay commit ledger 第一片已落地；生产级 tool exactly-once ledger 持久化、外部 commit store adapter、跨 worker 冲突处理仍需在 adapter 或宿主 worker 中实现
root SecretRef / SecretProvider / SecretValue secret provider 原子契约已具备第一片；更完整 sandbox profile、secret 继承授权策略和 prompt-injection defense 策略仍需继续深化

milestones.name: Integration and Extensibility Spine
milestones.objective: 提供 memory、skill、MCP、A2A、TurnLoop、middleware、plugin、channel/transfer、policy/redaction 和外部集成路线第一片。
open_items: MCP/A2A production transport、Lark 真实 client/OAuth、A2UI renderer、AG-UI WebSocket/plugin 仍在外部仓库路线中
真实 LangSmith SDK、LangGraph exporter policy/redaction 深化和插件级治理仍需外部 plugin/adapter 完成

milestones.name: Agent Template and Evidence Layer
milestones.objective: 在原子能力之上验证 ReAct、Agent-as-Tool、Dev Agent template contract、trajectory golden、verification evidence、entropy audit 和 reviewer/release gate。
open_items: self-bootstrap workflow release evidence 真实场景仍需扩展；release bundle conformance helper 已覆盖具体 CI gate requirement、release_bundle evidence metadata 对齐，以及 workflow release parent summary 与 bundle process 的 task/gate/review/count 对齐，workflow process conformance helper 已覆盖 workflow parent/child link、workflow parent input action_count、child task id 唯一性、child task input/output 的 mode/action/status/reason_count 对齐、action order、failed/interrupted summary、required input source、workflow output 与 child summary 的 mode/action/action_status/reason_count 以及 input/intervention count、release child summary 的 release gate input id / review intervention id 对账、input/intervention metadata、合法 action index、boundary mode/action/action_status 对齐、release action 的 release gate input 与 approved/rejected/pending review intervention 对账、allowed release 必须 resolved approval、rejected release 必须 rejected review boundary、interrupted release 必须 requested approval boundary 和 patch raw diff 不泄漏，action governance metadata 贯穿 process/workflow 边界，BuildProcessRecords 已支持 ActionInterrupted + GatePending，把等待人工 approval 的 release gate 记录为 TaskInterrupted、pending release gate input 和 InterventionRequested approval request，BuildWorkflowProcessRecords 已可对重复 action kind 的 child task id 追加稳定 workflow_action_index 消歧，并单独汇总 interrupted_action_count，workflow process conformance 已可拒绝导入/恢复记录里的重复 child task id，WorkflowRecordsFromRunExport 已可从 RunExport 恢复 workflow parent/child/input/intervention process records，按 workflow_action_index 恢复顺序，并在返回前复用 workflow process conformance 拒绝非一致记录，WorkflowActionProcessRecords 已可按 workflow_action_index 提取单个 child action 的 process records，WorkflowActionProcessRecordsFromRunExport 已可从 RunExport 直接恢复并按 action index 提取单个 child action process records，WorkflowActionProcessRecordsByAction / WorkflowActionProcessRecordsFromRunExportByAction 已可按唯一 action kind 提取单个 child action process records，并在重复 action kind 时要求调用方用 action index 或 child task id 消歧，WorkflowActionProcessRecordsByTaskID / WorkflowActionProcessRecordsFromRunExportByTaskID 已可按 child task id 提取单个 child action process records，ImportProcessRecords / ImportWorkflowRecords 已可把恢复后的 process/workflow records 校验并防御性写回 RunRecorder，形成 step 级 export/import 再封存闭环，BuildReleaseBundle 已拒绝 workflow child process records 混入其他 workflow_action_index 的 input/intervention 边界，template trajectory conformance 已覆盖 runtime identity consistency 和 required frame metadata 子集匹配，Dev Agent self-bootstrap golden trajectory 的 required frames 已固定 action/mode metadata，ReAct 普通 multi-tool-then-final 与 multi-tool-error golden trajectory、Agent-as-Tool local child run / local child failure / remote A2A stream / remote A2A send failure / remote A2A send timeout / remote A2A send policy deny / remote A2A stream policy deny / remote A2A cancel success / remote A2A cancel policy deny golden trajectory、Dev Agent rejected/interrupted workflow child summary（含 reason_count / interrupted_action_count）场景、Dev Agent 重复 action task id 消歧场景、Dev Agent workflow conformance 拒绝重复 child task id 场景、self-bootstrap release golden trajectory、self-bootstrap apply release golden trajectory、self-bootstrap rejected apply golden trajectory、self-bootstrap rejected release golden trajectory、self-bootstrap interrupted release golden trajectory、self-bootstrap resumed release golden trajectory 和 self-bootstrap resumed apply release golden trajectory 已覆盖；self-bootstrap rejected/interrupted/resumed release 与 resumed apply release 真实场景已把 workflow process records 写入 RunExport，并从 export 反取后通过 workflow process conformance；更多 template-specific golden trajectory tests 和更广 Dev Agent workflow process record 场景仍需扩展

workflow action summary resume boundary refs 已覆盖：BuildWorkflowProcessRecords 会在任何带 devagent.review_resume / InputResume 的 child action summary 中保留 resume_input_id，在任何带 approval review intervention 的 child action summary 中保留 review_intervention_id；CheckWorkflowProcessConformance 会对账 summary、resume input 和同 action review intervention，apply/release 等可恢复 step 都能从 workflow 父摘要定位恢复边界

ReAct memory worker 单次 pass、本地内存 DeferredMemoryWorkQueue、本地 visibility timeout reference、外部 durable queue 可复用的基础/visibility conformance helper（含 retry metadata preservation）、并发 Dequeue 不重复分发同一 job 的 conformance contract、默认有界 retry/backoff decider、worker 默认 decider 接线、worker executor、统一 worker recorder 可同时记录 pass memory_replay 和 retry/stop/dead-letter 调度 evidence、细粒度 pass/schedule recorder、RunOnce lease gate / pass-local lease renewal token fencing、release 幂等清理、有界 drain loop 和 retry/stop/dead-letter 调度决策 evidence 已具备；durable 生产队列 adapter、distributed queue leasing、并发调度、生产级调度策略、真实 retry/DLQ storage 和更高级 memory 压缩/合并策略仍需 template adapter 或宿主 harness 实现
远端 CI run/job/step 已观察结果 -> ci_gate evidence 桥接已具备第一片；model review 真实评测治理、CI provider 拉取/重跑/secret 治理和人工 release gate 仍需生产化

milestones.name: Production Hardening
milestones.objective: 让 core SDK、public API、schema、CI、release gate、文档、迁移策略和外部扩展仓库达到可长期依赖的状态。

evidence_records.notes: GitHub Actions run 28199128163 completed successfully on main; run steps Check whitespace, Test, Race, Vet, Lint, Coverage, Examples, and Security were all success.

Remote audit shows all 11 private external scaffold repositories exist and have CI workflows, but all lack GOPACT_GITHUB_TOKEN and their latest Actions runs fail because github.token cannot read the private core SDK repository. The -remote-status-json gate now emits blocking_reasons and required_actions so release automation can surface the same remediation plan.

open_items: 外部仓库 scaffold、sync-plan、sync-repos 脚本、sync-secrets 脚本、rerun-ci 脚本、本地 -verify、-plan-rerun-sh 和 -remote-status-json 远端审计已统一绑定 manifest required CI commands；2026-06-26 已真实创建并推送 11 个 gopact-ai 私有外部 scaffold 仓库，主仓已推送 v0.0.0 tag，外部仓库均已补充 go.sum 和私有 SDK 读取 workflow，remote audit 显示仓库存在、私有且 CI workflow 文件存在，并能直接审计 GOPACT_GITHUB_TOKEN secret；-remote-status-json 已把 ready gate 收敛为仓库存在、visibility 匹配、CI workflow 存在、GOPACT_GITHUB_TOKEN 存在和最新 CI 通过，并在未 ready 时输出 blocking_reasons / required_actions；最新 remote audit 显示 11 个外部仓库均缺少 GOPACT_GITHUB_TOKEN，最新 GitHub Actions run 仍全部失败，当前共性原因是默认 github.token 不能读取私有主仓 github.com/gopact-ai/gopact，需要配置具备主仓 read 权限的 GOPACT_GITHUB_TOKEN repo/org secret 后通过 rerun-ci.sh 重跑 CI，secret 未配置前 M6 不能视为完成
v1 前仍需继续外迁或删除主仓中过渡性生产 adapter/template

required_gates: human or reviewer decision before release
